name: update_plan
description: Create or update a short execution plan for the current task. Use this for multi-step work so the user can see progress with pending, in-progress, and completed steps.

explanation.description: Optional one- or two-sentence explanation of the plan.

steps.description: Ordered checklist for the current task. Keep it concise.

id.description: Optional stable identifier for the step.

notes.description: Optional short note about the step.
